sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram (input_string String, min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY input_string;
UPDATE test_ngram SET min_hash = ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string).1, max_hash = ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string).2 WHERE input_string = 'HelloWorld';
SELECT input_string, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input_string) AS hash_values FROM test_ngram;
